ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-26-2010 IN DEPT. 220, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D). CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET ON 9/24/10 IS VACATED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR FORUM NON CONVENIENS IS DENIED. TRIAL DATE IS SET ON 8/16/10 AT 11:15 A.M. IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140. NOTICE FOR MSJ IS 15 DAYS FOR PERSONAL SERVICE WITH 1 EXTRA DAY FOR E-SERVICE. HEARING DATE MAY BE SET ON 8/6/10, 8/10/10, 8/12/10 OR 8/16/10. BRIEFING SCHEDULE TO BE DISCUSSED AT A LATER HEARING. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A STATEMENT BY 7/12/10 IF NEW DISCOVERY EXISTS. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY QUESTIONS AS TO EACH DEFENDANT SEPARATELY AND STATE ALL FACTS ON LIABLILITY AS TO EACH DEFENDANT, IDENTIFY ALL CONTACT INFORMATION OF KNOWLEDGE AND STATE WHAT THAT KNOWLEDGE IS AS TO EACH DEFENDANT, AND IDENTIFY AND PRODUCE EACH DOCUMENT THAT REFERS TO THESE FACTS. IF FACT IS IN A TRANSCRIPT INCLUDE PAGE, NAME OF DEPONENT, DATE OF DEPOSITION, AND THE COMPARABLE FOR COURT TESTIMONY. RESPONSE IS DUE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE. DUE DATE FOR PREVIOUS DISCOVERY REQUEST IS EXTENDED 1 WEEK. IF THE DEADLINE IS LONGER THAN 1 WEEK, THE LONGER DEADLINE GOVERNS. DISCOVERY CLOSES ON 8/16/10 ABSENT GOOD CAUSE. NO DISCOVERY MOTION MAY BE FILED WITHOUT JUDGE KAHN'S PRIOR APPROVAL. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT WITHIN 30 DAYS. ALL DEFENDANTS SHALL DISCLOSE ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND THAT WILL RELY ON PROPOSITION 51 PURPOSES OR FOR THEIR AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT WITHIN 50 DAYS. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR 6/15/10 AT 1:30P.M. IN DEPT. 220. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. PER DIEM FEES IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $365.50 IS ASSESSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: D. LOK; MATTER NO REPORTED (220)
